name: All Class Limousine
recent_news: No school transportation activity identified; website (allclasslimousine.com) markets stretch limos, Mercedes/BMW sedans, party buses for weddings/airport/winery tours only.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in target. Pure luxury/event limo operator in Clifton NJ with ~2 employees and no school bus or special-needs student transport services. Out of scope.

name: Choice Limo LLC
recent_news: Operating in central NJ since 1990 (33+ years per website); fleet consists of Lincoln Town Cars, Mercedes sedans and Suburban SUVs. No school district contracts identified.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in target. Sole-prop limo/black-car service with elder-care add-on; no school bus fleet, no SPED contracts, ~2 employees. Out of scope.

name: Goldstar Limousine
recent_news: Marketed as Gold Star Limousine Services (lilimos.com) with 3+ decades in business; serves corporate, weddings, proms, sweet 16s, Atlantic City casinos. No school bus or special-needs student transport services advertised. Note: separate, unrelated 'GoldStar Transit' (ridegst.com) is a school transportation provider.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in target. Independent luxury limo operator in La Habra CA; no fleet of school buses or SPED routes. Out of scope.

name: Nu Care Transport Inc
recent_news: Affiliated with Nu Care Inc (nu.care), an independently owned non-medical home care and wheelchair transport provider in Orange County/LA; credentialed by VA and Regional Centers. Founded 2017 (transport entity). Provides respite around school schedules but is not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in target. Home-care/NEMT and wheelchair-transport company, not a school bus operator. Adjacent special-needs work but no district contracts or yellow-bus fleet. Out of scope.

name: Radi Inc
recent_news: Operates as Radi Limousine Inc serving Chicagoland for 25+ years; fleet includes Mercedes S550, BMW 740i, Suburban, Escalade, Sprinter vans, mini coaches and full-size buses for charter. No school district contracts identified.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in target. Chicagoland luxury limo and charter operator owned by Gino Burchici; no yellow-bus fleet or SPED/district contracts. Out of scope.
